description: Database of ~50 popular LLMs with fingerprints and known vulnerabilities

models.name: Llama 3 8B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Roleplay Jailbreak
known_vulnerabilities.description: Susceptible to fictional persona jailbreaks (DAN, evil assistant)

known_vulnerabilities.name: Multi-turn Escalation
known_vulnerabilities.description: Safety degrades over long conversations with gradual escalation

known_vulnerabilities.name: System Prompt Override
known_vulnerabilities.description: Policy Puppetry attacks can override system instructions

models.safety_notes: Generally well-aligned but smaller 8B version has gaps

models.name: Llama 3 70B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Roleplay Jailbreak
known_vulnerabilities.description: Still susceptible but more resistant than 8B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Context Overflow
known_vulnerabilities.description: Very long contexts can dilute safety training

models.safety_notes: More robust than 8B, but not immune

models.name: Llama 2 7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Weak Safety Training
known_vulnerabilities.description: Older model with less robust safety alignment

known_vulnerabilities.name: Base64 Bypass
known_vulnerabilities.description: Encoding attacks often succeed

models.safety_notes: Outdated safety training - upgrade to Llama 3 recommended

models.name: Mistral 7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Minimal Safety Guardrails
known_vulnerabilities.description: Intentionally less restrictive than competitors

known_vulnerabilities.name: No System Prompt Protection
known_vulnerabilities.description: System prompts easily leaked or overridden

known_vulnerabilities.name: Helpful to a Fault
known_vulnerabilities.description: Prioritizes helpfulness over safety

models.safety_notes: Designed to be less restrictive - expect low refusal rates

models.name: Mixtral 8x7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Minimal Safety Guardrails
known_vulnerabilities.description: Same permissive design as Mistral 7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Expert Routing Confusion
known_vulnerabilities.description: MoE architecture may have inconsistent safety across experts

models.safety_notes: More capable but similar safety profile to 7B

models.name: Phi-3 Mini

known_vulnerabilities.name: Small Model Safety Gap
known_vulnerabilities.description: Limited parameters mean weaker safety generalization

known_vulnerabilities.name: Instruction Following Override
known_vulnerabilities.description: Strong instruction following can override safety

models.safety_notes: Impressive for size but safety suffers from small parameter count

models.name: Phi-2

known_vulnerabilities.name: Minimal Safety Training
known_vulnerabilities.description: Very limited safety alignment

known_vulnerabilities.name: No Refusal Behavior
known_vulnerabilities.description: Often complies with harmful requests directly

models.safety_notes: Research model - not intended for safety-critical use

models.name: Gemma 2B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Small Model Weakness
known_vulnerabilities.description: 2B parameters insufficient for robust safety

known_vulnerabilities.name: Encoding Bypass
known_vulnerabilities.description: Base64 and hex encoding often bypass filters

models.safety_notes: Use Gemma 7B for better safety

models.name: Gemma 7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Roleplay Weakness
known_vulnerabilities.description: Fictional framing can bypass safety

known_vulnerabilities.name: Multi-language Bypass
known_vulnerabilities.description: Non-English prompts may have weaker filtering

models.safety_notes: Reasonable safety but not enterprise-grade

models.name: Gemma 2 9B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Improved but Not Immune
known_vulnerabilities.description: Better than Gemma 1 but still has gaps

models.safety_notes: Significant improvement over Gemma 1

models.name: Qwen 2.5 7B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Chinese-English Safety Gap
known_vulnerabilities.description: Safety may differ between languages

known_vulnerabilities.name: Academic Framing
known_vulnerabilities.description: Research/education framing can bypass filters

models.safety_notes: Good general safety but multilingual gaps exist

models.name: Qwen 2.5 72B

known_vulnerabilities.name: Chinese-English Safety Gap
known_vulnerabilities.description: Better than smaller models but still present

models.safety_notes: One of the safer open models at this size

models.name: GPT-3.5 Turbo

known_vulnerabilities.name: DAN Jailbreak Family
known_vulnerabilities.description: Various 'Do Anything Now' prompts have worked

known_vulnerabilities.name: System Prompt Leakage
known_vulnerabilities.description: System prompts can sometimes be extracted

known_vulnerabilities.name: Token Manipulation
known_vulnerabilities.description: Some token-level attacks still work

models.safety_notes: Well-aligned but older model with known bypasses

models.name: GPT-4

refusal: I'm not able to help with

known_vulnerabilities.name: Multi-turn Manipulation
known_vulnerabilities.description: Gradual escalation over many turns

known_vulnerabilities.name: Fictional Framing
known_vulnerabilities.description: Creative writing context can reduce refusals

models.safety_notes: One of the safest commercial models

models.name: GPT-4o

known_vulnerabilities.description: Image-based prompt injection possible

known_vulnerabilities.description: Voice mode may have different safety thresholds

models.safety_notes: New attack surface via multimodal inputs

known_vulnerabilities.name: Roleplay Persona
known_vulnerabilities.description: Strong personas can sometimes override safety

vulnerability_categories.direct: Model responds to straightforward harmful requests
vulnerability_categories.encoding: Vulnerable to Base64, hex, ROT13 encoded requests
vulnerability_categories.policy_puppetry: Fake policy/config files can override safety
vulnerability_categories.context_overflow: Very long contexts dilute safety training
vulnerability_categories.code_completion: Will complete malicious code if started
